sentences.target: Je te félicite pour ton nouveau poste.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tə felisit puʁ tɔ̃ nuvo pɔst/

translations.fr: Je te félicite pour ton nouveau poste.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tə felisit puʁ tɔ̃ nuvo pɔst/
translations.en: I'm congratulating you on your new job.
translations.es: Te felicito por tu nuevo trabajo.
translations.de: Ich gratuliere dir zu deinem neuen Job.
translations.it: Ti faccio i complimenti per il tuo nuovo lavoro.
translations.he: מזל טוב על העבודה החדשה שלך.
translations.vi: Chúc mừng công việc mới của bạn.
translations.hi: तुम्हें नई नौकरी के लिए बधाई।
translations.el: Συγχαρητήρια για τη νέα σου δουλειά.
translations.ro: Felicitări pentru noul tău loc de muncă.
translations.ja: 新しい仕事、おめでとう。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject of the finite verb 'félicite'.
Clitic 2nd-person singular object pronoun placed before the verb; direct object of 'félicite'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object ('te') and a 'pour' prepositional complement expressing reason.
Preposition introducing a PP that gives the cause/occasion ('pour ton nouveau poste').
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; agrees with 'poste' (masculine singular) and modifies the noun.
Adjective, masculine singular; prenominal; modifies 'poste'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP 'ton nouveau poste'; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Nous vous félicitons pour votre mariage.

translations.fr: Nous vous félicitons pour votre mariage.
translations.en: We congratulate you on your wedding.
translations.de: Wir gratulieren Ihnen zu Ihrer Hochzeit.
translations.it: Vi facciamo i complimenti per il vostro matrimonio.
translations.vi: Chúc mừng đám cưới của các bạn.
translations.hi: हम आपको आपकी शादी की बधाई देते हैं।
translations.id: Kami mengucapkan selamat atas pernikahan kalian.
translations.sv: Vi gratulerar er till ert bröllop.
translations.da: Vi ønsker jer tillykke med jeres bryllup.
translations.ja: ご結婚おめでとうございます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'félicitons'.
Clitic 2nd-person plural/formal object pronoun; preverbal; direct object of 'félicitons'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, with 'vous' as direct object and a 'pour' PP indicating reason.
Preposition introducing a complement expressing the occasion/cause.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person plural/formal; modifies 'mariage' (masculine singular).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'pour'.

translations.en: I'd like to congratulate the whole team.
translations.es: Me gustaría felicitar a todo el equipo.
translations.de: Ich möchte dem ganzen Team gratulieren.
translations.it: Vorrei fare i complimenti a tutta la squadra.
translations.ru: Я хотел бы поздравить всю команду.
translations.pt: Gostaria de parabenizar toda a equipe.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn chúc mừng toàn bộ nhóm.
translations.nl: Ik wil het hele team feliciteren.
translations.hi: मैं पूरी टीम को बधाई देना चाहता हूँ।
translations.el: Θα ήθελα να συγχαρώ όλη την ομάδα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne gratulere hele teamet.
translations.id: Saya ingin mengucapkan selamat kepada seluruh tim.
translations.sv: Jag vill gärna gratulera hela teamet.
translations.ro: Aș dori să felicit întreaga echipă.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne lykønske hele holdet.
translations.ja: チーム全員にお祝いを申し上げたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun 'je' with elision before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular; subject of 'aimerais'.
Finite verb, conditional present, 1st person singular; expresses desire/politeness; selects an infinitival complement ('féliciter').
Infinitive verb functioning as a non-finite complement (xcomp) of 'aimerais'; transitive, taking the NP 'toute l'équipe' as direct object.
Quantifying determiner meaning 'the whole/all'; feminine singular form agreeing with 'équipe'.
Definite article with elision (le/la → l') before vowel; here underlying 'la' due to feminine noun; introduces 'équipe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP 'toute l'équipe'; direct object of 'féliciter'.

sentences.target: Elle félicite son frère pour son diplôme.
sentences.reading: /ɛl felisit sɔ̃ fʁɛʁ puʁ sɔ̃ diplom/

translations.fr: Elle félicite son frère pour son diplôme.
translations.ipa: /ɛl felisit sɔ̃ fʁɛʁ puʁ sɔ̃ diplom/
translations.en: She congratulates her brother on his diploma.
translations.es: Ella felicita a su hermano por su título.
translations.de: Sie gratuliert ihrem Bruder zu seinem Abschluss.
translations.it: Si congratula con suo fratello per il suo diploma.
translations.ru: Она поздравляет своего брата с получением диплома.
translations.pt: Ela parabeniza o irmão dela pelo diploma.
translations.he: היא מברכת את אחיה על התואר.
translations.vi: Cô ấy chúc mừng em trai của mình vì tấm bằng.
translations.ar: هي تهنئ أخاها على حصوله على الشهادة.
translations.nl: Ze feliciteert haar broer met zijn diploma.
translations.uk: Вона вітає свого брата з отриманням диплома.
translations.hi: वह अपने भाई को उसकी डिग्री पर बधाई देती है.
translations.pl: Ona gratuluje swojemu bratu zdobycia dyplomu.
translations.el: Αυτή συγχαίρει τον αδελφό της για το πτυχίο του.
translations.nb: Hun gratulerer broren sin med diplomet.
translations.id: Dia memberi selamat kepada saudara laki-lakinya atas ijazahnya.
translations.sv: Hon gratulerar sin bror till diplomet.
translations.ro: Ea își felicită fratele pentru diplomă.
translations.cs: Ona gratuluje svému bratrovi k diplomu.
translations.da: Hun lykønsker sin bror med diplomet.
translations.ja: 彼女は兄の学位取得を祝う。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of 'félicite'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'son frère' as direct object and a 'pour' PP.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'frère' (masculine singular); indicates possession.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'félicite'.
Preposition introducing a PP that specifies the reason/occasion ('pour son diplôme').
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; modifies 'diplôme' (masculine singular).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'; denotes the occasion for congratulations.

Elle félicite son frère pour son diplôme.

We congratulate you on your wedding.
I'd like to congratulate the whole team.
She congratulates her brother on his diploma.
